title: Defense Tech, Tactical ISR Drone Patrol Over Desert Border
description: Cinematic aerial photograph of a matte black tactical ISR drone flying low over a Saharan desert border zone at golden hour, sensor gimbal visible, dramatic wide-angle composition.
content: Photorealistic cinematic aerial photograph of a matte black tactical ISR quadrotor drone flying low over a vast Saharan desert border zone at golden hour. Military-grade carbon-fiber airframe with sensor gimbal pod and terrain surveillance cameras on undercarriage. Long shadows across rippled sand dunes, warm amber and deep orange sky, atmospheric dust haze near horizon. Dramatic wide-angle cinematic composition, subtle sun flare at frame edge. Extreme texture detail on rotor blades and airframe, high dynamic range lighting, no people visible, professional aerial military photography style, photorealistic, 8K.

Professional surveillance photography aesthetic, photorealistic hardware detail, 8K, sharp focus on drone body, no motion blur.
